resolution.note: Concept-hierarchy feature complete. Shipped: v3_006 schema (4 tables), three-tier taxonomy.toml hand-clustered into 22 families (6 domains, 95 concepts incl 7 ex-orphans), sync_taxonomy.py, family context in review surfaces, export.py + corpus-schema.sql at SCHEMA_VERSION 3. Live guru.db backfilled (28 families, 95 primaries, 0 orphans). Tagging deliberately kept on the flat v1 prompt — the grouped v2 prompt benched worse and was reverted; the hierarchy is a retrieval/structure layer decoupled from tagging (docs/concept-hierarchy/bench-v1-vs-v2.md). guru-web alignment written up in docs/concept-hierarchy/guru-web-alignment.md (must bump EXPECTED_SCHEMA_VERSION 2→3).
